description: You are a Platform Engineer migrating a legacy financial settlement system to a containerized environment. The application is a 'black box' Python binary that writes audit logs to '/var/opt/settlement/audit/transaction.log' and generates HTML reports in '/var/opt/settlement/reports/'. Modify the Docker Compose configuration at '~/projects/settlement-system/docker-compose.yml' to implement Sidecar and Ambassador patterns without modifying the legacy application's image or code. The updated configuration must include a 'log-sidecar' service (alpine) that tails the 'transaction.log' to stdout—handling the race condition where the file may not exist immediately—and a 'report-sidecar' service (nginx:alpine) that serves the reports directory on host port 8080. Ensure legacy-core, log-sidecar, and report-sidecar all start and run successfully. Login: user 'ga', password 'password123'.
